text: Ever seen a doughnut that could change the world? Introducing the tokamak—a magnetic bottle designed to contain fusion plasma. Fusion is the process that powers the sun, but harnessing it is incredibly challenging. Tokamaks use powerful magnetic fields to keep plasma stable at extreme temperatures—millions of degrees! If successful, tokamaks could lead to nearly limitless clean energy. Curious about how fusion energy could power our future? Follow for more insights!
